title: Create a responsive business website (brochure/landing page)

requirements.text: Create a responsive business website frontend suitable for a generic small business, with a single-page layout containing: a top navigation bar, a hero section with headline + subheadline + primary call-to-action button, an About section, a Services section (at least 3 services), a Testimonials/Reviews section (at least 3 items), a Contact section (business email/phone/address placeholders), and a footer with social links placeholders.
acceptanceCriteria: The home page renders all required sections in a logical order and is usable on mobile and desktop breakpoints.
Navigation allows jumping to each section (e.g., anchor links / scroll targets).
All copy is in English and uses clear placeholder business content (e.g., 'Your Business Name', 'hello@yourbusiness.com').

requirements.text: Implement a coherent visual theme for the business website and apply it consistently across all sections (colors, typography, spacing, button styles, and section backgrounds). Avoid a blue/purple primary palette.
acceptanceCriteria: The site has a consistent design system (typography scale, spacing, and component styling) across all sections.
Primary and secondary actions have consistent button styling.
The primary color palette is not blue/purple-dominant.

requirements.text: Add a Contact form section with fields for name, email, and message, including basic client-side validation and a non-backend submission behavior that works without external services (e.g., mailto link or a local 'Thank you' state).
acceptanceCriteria: Form shows validation errors for empty required fields and invalid email format.
Submitting the form results in a clear user confirmation (e.g., 'Thanks—we will get back to you soon') without requiring any third-party service.
No backend calls are required for the contact form behavior.

requirements.text: Add basic SEO and sharing metadata for the website (document title and meta description) and ensure accessible markup (semantic headings, visible focus states, and sufficient color contrast for text).
acceptanceCriteria: The page has a meaningful title and meta description.
Headings follow a logical hierarchy (single H1, then H2s for sections).
Interactive elements are keyboard navigable with visible focus styling.

requirements.text: Place the generated images into frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the website (logo in navbar/footer, hero image in hero section, service icons in services section).
acceptanceCriteria: All required generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated.
The logo appears in the navbar and footer.
The hero image is visible in the hero section.
Service icons are displayed alongside service items.

constraints: Use English for all user-facing text.
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or the Internet Identity hook files listed as immutable by the system context.
Stay within the provided stack (React + TypeScript + Tailwind + React Query; Motoko backend available but not required for this brochure site).
nonGoals: Third-party authentication providers (only Internet Identity is supported, and it is not required for this request).
Blog/CMS with rich content editing UI.
Integrations with external email/SMS providers or CRMs.

required: Minimal modern logo mark with clean lines, warm neutral palette (business-logo.dim_512x512.png)
Wide hero banner image with abstract shapes and warm neutral tones (hero-banner.dim_1600x900.png)
Simple line icon for 'Consulting' service, matching logo style (icon-consulting.dim_256x256.png)
Simple line icon for 'Design' service, matching logo style (icon-design.dim_256x256.png)
Simple line icon for 'Support' service, matching logo style (icon-support.dim_256x256.png)
